sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_random_ascii (id Int32, random_str String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_random_ascii (id, random_str) VALUES (1, randomPrintableASCII(20));
SELECT id, random_str, length(random_str) as str_length FROM test_random_ascii WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_random_ascii SET random_str = randomPrintableASCII(15) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, randomPrintableASCII(25) as new_random_str FROM test_random_ascii LIMIT 5;
